business.name: Mark's Appliance Service
business.tagline: Fix it right, price it fair

hero.headline: *Same-day* appliance repair that won't break the bank
hero.subheadline: No service call fees. Just honest work from a Canton tech who's been keeping appliances running for years.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every appliance in your home
services_section.subheading: From washers that won't drain to ovens that won't heat — we handle it all

services.title: Washer & Dryer Repair
services.description: Leaks, won't spin, not heating up. We diagnose the problem and get your laundry routine back on track.

services.title: Dishwasher Service
services.description: Not cleaning dishes or won't drain? We handle repairs and new installations with floor protection.

services.title: Oven & Range Repair
services.description: Gas or electric, slow preheating to complete breakdowns. We explain what went wrong while we fix it.

services.title: New Appliance Installation
services.description: Hood vents, dishwashers, and more. Professional installation with proper protection for your floors and surfaces.

about.heading: The Canton appliance guy
about.body: We show up when we say we will, fix what's broken, and explain what happened. No service call fees — just honest work at fair prices.

reviews.name: Mary S.
reviews.text: Same day service for my dryer problem at a very reasonable price. Mark is knowledgeable, honest, and reliable — doesn't try to pump up charges.

reviews.name: Keith T.
reviews.text: Installed new hood vent and dishwasher right on time. Protected our brand new stove and the floors throughout. Excellent work.

reviews.name: Andrew C.
reviews.text: Fixed our slow-preheating gas oven and taught me a few things along the way. No service call charge — reasonable pricing all around.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Canton and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout Stark County

cta.heading: Appliance acting up?
cta.body: No service call fees. Just honest diagnosis and fair pricing. Call today for same-day service.
